description_long: This is a large, cylindrical yellow barrel with a weathered appearance, featuring rust-colored stains running vertically down its sides. The barrel has two prominent horizontal metal bands, one near the top and one near the bottom, providing structural reinforcement. The top surface is mostly closed, with a small, round, dark cap or bung off-center, suggesting it can be opened for filling or emptying. On one side, there is a white sign with red text that reads 'SALE ON ALL BODY PARTS! (Pre-used items: must go!)', giving the object a humorous or macabre urban character. The surface finish is matte and slightly rough, with visible wear and streaks that suggest long-term outdoor exposure. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, likely steel, with some plastic or rubber components for the cap.
description: A large, weathered yellow metal barrel with rust stains, reinforced by two metal bands and a humorous sale sign on one side.
description_view_0: The barrel is shown with visible rust streaks and the top cap, but no sign or label is visible from this angle.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the barrel, displaying the white sale sign with red text and the top cap.
description_view_2: The barrel is rotated to show the opposite side from the sign, with rust streaks and the cap visible but no label.
description_view_3: The barrel is shown with the cap centered at the top, no sign or label visible, and rust streaks prominent.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: white sign with red text: 'SALE ON ALL BODY PARTS! (Pre-used items: must go!)'
